summary: Frontend-only testing of Frameflow client dashboard new features. All 9 requested features verified successfully. Login flow, Home Dashboard (6 creation modes), Reel Generation (2 styles, 5 credits), Photoshoot (brief suggestions, 1 credit), Inspo Gallery (category filters, empty state), Calendar (Month/Week toggle, clickable dates with modal), Analytics (Demo mode, Indian number format 8,54,200, credits meter), Settings (4 tabs working), and Mobile responsiveness (hamburger menu) all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Using existing test client from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new pages verified: ReelGenerationPage (2 styles - Cinematic/Casual, 5 credits), PhotoshootPage (brief suggestions buttons, 1 credit), InspoGalleryPage (7 category filters, empty state with Create Content First button), CalendarPage (Month/Week toggle, navigation arrows, clickable dates open Schedule Post modal), AnalyticsPage (Demo Mode banner, Connect Instagram banner, Indian number format 8,54,200 and 45,890, credits meter 0/250), SettingsPage (4 tabs - Profile/Integrations/Preferences/Billing with toggle switches), InboxPage (Connect Instagram prompt). Mobile hamburger menu working correctly on mobile viewport.

features_verified.2_home_dashboard: PASS - Shows greeting with brand name, credit meter (0/250 creatives used), 6 creation modes in 2x3 grid (Content Swipe with 'Best' badge, Concept, Clone Template, Variations, Photoshoot, Reel)
features_verified.3_reel_generation_page: PASS - 2 style cards (Cinematic Product Showcase, Casual Behind The Scenes), 'Reels cost 5 credits' text displayed
features_verified.4_photoshoot_page: PASS - Product input field, 6 brief suggestion buttons (Flat lay on marble, Rustic wooden table, Dark moody lighting, Bright minimal, Natural daylight, Artistic angle), Generate Photo (1 credit) button
features_verified.5_inspo_gallery: PASS - 7 category filter buttons (All, Café, Bakery, Restaurant, Festival, Offers, Desserts), empty state with 'No inspiration yet' placeholder and Create Content First button
features_verified.6_calendar: PASS - Month/Week toggle, navigation arrows, day headers (Sun-Sat), clickable dates open Schedule Post modal with library selection, time, platform (Feed/Story/Reel), caption, hashtags, status (Scheduled/Draft), Schedule button
features_verified.7_analytics: PASS - Demo Mode banner, Connect Instagram banner with button, 4 stat cards (12 Posts this month, 8,54,200 Total reach, 45,890 Total engagement, 5.4% Engagement rate), Credits Used meter (0/250), Best Performing Post section, Reach Over Time and Engagement Breakdown placeholders
features_verified.8_settings: PASS - 4 tabs (Profile, Integrations, Preferences, Billing). Profile: brand name, email, phone fields. Integrations: Instagram connect, Swiggy/Zomato URLs, Show Delivery Badges toggle. Preferences: Default Language (English/Hindi/Bengali), Default Post Format, Default Reel Style, Email Notifications toggle, Share to Inspiration Gallery toggle. Billing: Credits meter with gradient card, Contact on WhatsApp button
features_verified.9_mobile_responsiveness: PASS - Hamburger menu button (data-testid='mobile-menu-btn') visible on mobile viewport, opens sidebar with navigation links (Home, Chat, Library, DNA, Inspo, Calendar, Analytics, Settings, Logout)

whatsapp_button: PASS - WhatsApp float button present on all pages (green circle at bottom right)
